text: - e. (Division 22) Plumbing All domestic water, sanitary sewer, storm sewer, gas, and air piping systems with a diameter 3/4' and larger, inclusive of fittings, valves, insulation, equipment and clearances as required by equipment and code, modeled at the correct orientation, location and size.  Hangers and supports, accessories, in-wall piping (LOD 350), inverts modeled at the correct elevation, bathroom carriers, drain bodies and equipment pads as required. Required access panels shall also be modeled.
